urdu transliteration text: Ay Mere Akhi Abbas:
english translation text:
O My Brother Abbas
Context:  The poet visualizes the final conversation between Imam Hussain and Abbas as Abbas lies dying on the sands of Karbala.

urdu transliteration text: Ay mere akhi abbas)
english translation text: O my brother Abbas!

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: bachpan me tera jhula, haathon se jhulaaya tha
english translation text: When you were a child, with my own hands did I swing your cradle

urdu transliteration text: hathon ko tere lekar, chalna bhi sikhaaya tha
english translation text: And taking your hand in mine, I showed you how to walk

urdu transliteration text: ab in hathon se me, kistarha uthaauga, bin baazu ye laash teri
english translation text: Now pray! How with these same hands am I to lift this, your corpse?

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: Aankho(n) ka diya tum ho, Khaliq ki ata tum ho
english translation text: You are the lantern of our eyes; You are the Creator’s gift

urdu transliteration text: Baba ne jo maangi thi, rabse wo dua tum ho
english translation text: You are the fruit of our father’s prayer

urdu transliteration text: Saqqaye Sakina ho, Zainab ki rida tum ho, tum hi ho kamar meri
english translation text: You are the quencher of Sakina’s thirst; You are Zaynab’s veil; You are my backbone

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: Teero(n) ke musalle par, sar ko mei kataawunga
english translation text: Soon, upon a bed of arrows, shall I sacrifice my head

urdu transliteration text: Kya dekh sakoge tum, mei khu(n) mei nahawunga
english translation text: Will you be able to endure that sight, when I’ll be bathed in blood

urdu transliteration text: Zakhmi mere sine se, har khun ke qatre se, awaaz ye aayengi
english translation text: And from my wounded chest, and from every drop of blood, shall arise this voice:

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: Akbar ka kaleja hai, nazro(n) mei mere bhayya
english translation text: Soon shall I, with my own eyes, see Akbar’s heart, O brother!

urdu transliteration text: Asghar ka lahu hoga, haatho(n) mei mere bhayya
english translation text: And soon shall my hands, with Asghar’s blood, be covered, O brother!

urdu transliteration text: May kisko pukarunga, may kisko sada dunga, batlaado mere ghazi
english translation text: Who will I call? To whom will I cry out?  Tell me O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: Sunteho Sakina ke, lab par hai fughaa(n) bhai,
english translation text: Can you hear the sorrowful cry on Sakina’s lips?

urdu transliteration text: Lot aao mere ammu, paani nahi mangungi
english translation text: “Return O my uncle, I shall not seek water”

urdu transliteration text: Ab rut na jaawo tum, itna to zara socho, marjaayegi wo bachi
english translation text: Do not turn away, think how the little girl will die!

urdu transliteration text: (Faryad suno meri, ik baar mujhe bhaayi, kehkar to bula ghazi)
english translation text: Listen to my plea! Just once, call me “brother” O Ghazi!

urdu transliteration text: Rukh karke najaf ka phir ghazi ne kaha baba
english translation text: Turning towards najaf, the flag bearer said to his father,

urdu transliteration text: Ab paas nahi baazo, may kya karu ya Zahra
english translation text: Now I don't have my arms with me, what will I do Oh Zahra?

urdu transliteration text:
Maula hai akela ab, karbal me bachi hai bas,
Shabbir ki tanhayi
english translation text: Maula is alone, all that's left in Karbala is the loneliness of Shabbir
